description_text: Item Description Features: *4pcs Car Carbon Fiber Color EVO Combat Air Knife Front Bumper Spoilers *Injection molding, surface lacquer, not easy to fade out *Can protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages *Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look *Fit for most of the cars, trucks and SUVs *With adhesive tape on the back, directly attached to the front bumper, if use the screw to reinforce, it will be more stable *Brand New and High Quality Specifications: *Material: PP *Color: Carbon Fiber *Dimension: 32.5*13cm/12.8*5.12 inches, 28*13cm/11.02*5.12 inches (Approx.) *Quantity: 4pcs (2pcs for big size and 2pcs for small size) *Weight: 230g (Approx.) Package Contents: 4pcs Car Front Bumper Spoilers Note: The real color of the item may be slightly different from the pictures shown on website caused by many factors such as brightness of your monitor and light brightness. Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About US 1.Item location:Guangzhou,China Item will be shipped out receipt of your payment. We ship the item through CHINA Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging. Normally, the item will arrive in 15-20 days. But sometimes it takes a little bit longer, goes to 20-30 days or more 2.Item location:California, United States Item will be shipped out within 24 hours upon receipt of your payment. Orders from the USA will all be shipped out via Carrier UPS OR USPS.Usually it takes up 3~8 business days for delivery. Delivery time (including weekend): 5.21%(1~2days)----65.68%(3~5D)----22.19%(6~8D)----2.47%(9~10D)----1.26%(above 10D) When you find track information is abnormal or not get goods in 10 days, please feel free to email contact us first for troubleshooting,Don't open dispute case immediately Please. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct.If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment
